description: Minimalist styling peppered with innovative design details, we love wearable timepieces by QnQ! Styled to perfection, this watch is the perfect accessory staple you've been looking for. Liven up the summer with this watch from QnQ! Case diameter: 40 mm Case thickness: 6 mm Dial shape: Round Steel case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfort Steel bracelet with a butterfly clasp for comfort and style Black dial with branding at the 3 hour mark Analogue movement of time display Screw to reset time Solid stainless steel case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistant up to 30 metres
